name: Catfish Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Catfish fillets, cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, cook the bacon until crisp.
2. Add onion and cook until tender.
3. Add potatoes, tomatoes, and water. Cover and simmer until potatoes are tender.
4. Add corn and seasonings. Cook slowly and adjust seasonings as needed.
5. Add catfish 5 to 10 minutes before serving and simmer.
